creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-12-07 04:10:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-ShipIt-Step-Manifest Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This step recreates the MANIFEST by effectively running make
  manifest, or the equivalent in your build process.
  
  I use this as I don't have superfluous files lying around in the
  distribution directories, and have set the relevant svk ignore
  properties.
  
  To use it, just list in your .shipit file.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/ShipIt-Step-Manifest/
  
  PR:             ports/152634
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4160    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/devel/p5-ShipIt-Step-Manifest/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-ShipIt-Step-Manifest/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/devel/p5-ShipIt-Step-Manifest/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/devel/p5-ShipIt-Step-Manifest/pkg-plist (new)
